scope: B9.0 prospective randomized-audit contract design -- DESIGN red-team (2 rounds, before any B9.1 data). Development-only, NO scientific claim, NO tag. B9.0 is protocol + schema + exact-null + state-machine + dry-run ONLY.

round_1.verdict: 3 lenses; all 4 declared hard-stops PASS (contract-first, Z/T-blind validator, no-fitted-null, fail-closed); pre-assignment-Y_design is a GENUINE design-level collider fix vs B8.3, honestly scoped. Found 2 real gaps -> FIXED.

gaps_found_and_fixed.gap: the hash-pin did NOT bind the executed data to the registered table -- check_contract computed adherence then DISCARDED it, so a re-randomized (adherence 0.515) or fully-flipped (0.0) executed C still certified VALID and ran the null. The SOLE B9-vs-B8 differentiator (pre-registration) was decorative + an anti-p-hacking hole.
gaps_found_and_fixed.fix: H2 now REQUIRES executed adherence to the registered table (refuse: executed_deviates_from_registered_table).

gaps_found_and_fixed.gap: the crux provenance flags (manifest.generated_before_recording / Y_design_pre_assignment) were NEVER read -- a table with both False validated.
gaps_found_and_fixed.fix: H1b now REQUIRES both flags True (refuse: table_not_pre_recording_or_ydesign_post_hoc); data-level provenance is inherently unverifiable from (C,Y_design,Z) and is documented as an attestation floor guaranteed by the B9.1 acquisition protocol.

gaps_found_and_fixed.gap: reason codes entangled (condition_lock/session also fired cxy_design_imbalance via all-one-C strata).
gaps_found_and_fixed.fix: _max_cxy_imbalance now ignores single-condition strata -> reasons disjoint (dry-run verified).

gaps_found_and_fixed.gap: alert conjunction underspecified; collider wording unconditional; unused seed param.
gaps_found_and_fixed.fix: alert conjunction pinned in CONTRACT.md/schema (estimable AND p_meanT<=0.025 AND p_stud<=0.025 AND n_eligible>=20; LCB>0 dropped -- reconsider before B9.1); collider claim qualified to 'collider-free CONDITIONAL on genuine within-stratum randomization'; unused seed removed.

round_2.verdict: 2 lenses; CONFIRMED the round-1 fixes genuinely close the holes adversarially (re-randomized/flipped/partial C + false/missing/non-bool manifest flags all REFUSE before the p-value; no regression; Z/T-blindness preserved; reason disentangling works). States disjoint, estimand an honest refusal, dry-run correct. Found 1 real MEDIUM + coverage gaps -> FIXED.

gaps_found_and_fixed.gap: H2 bound only executed C to the table, NOT executed Y_design (nor subject/microblock) -- a C-adherent execution with Y_design relabeled within (subject,microblock,C) blocks (balance/prior/support preserved) still certified VALID and ran the null. Since the null holds Y_design fixed, this is the SAME class of anti-p-hacking hole on the other pre-registered factor, and it is checkable from the Z-blind inputs (NOT the disclosed inherently-unverifiable residual).
gaps_found_and_fixed.fix: H2 now binds the FULL pre-registered tuple (C, Y_design, subject, microblock) == table row-for-row; new dry-run world INVALID_executed_ydesign_relabel REFUSES.

gaps_found_and_fixed.gap: dry-run panel left reachable branches unexercised: hash-mismatch on a PRESENT table, SAMPLER_INVALID, contract-nsup<min_support.
gaps_found_and_fixed.fix: added INVALID_pinned_hash_corrupt (present table + corrupted pin -> missing_or_invalid_assignment_table); DISCLOSED that SAMPLER_INVALID + contract-nsup are reachable DEFENSIVE fail-closed states a valid balanced contract cannot synthetically trigger (verified reachable by code inspection; guard real-data pathologies in B9.1).

gaps_found_and_fixed.gap: the size_ok alert-gate (n_eligible>=20) was never exercised on a valid-but-underpowered world; H2 aligns by positional index (no per-trial join key).
gaps_found_and_fixed.fix: added VALID_underpowered_size_gate (12 subjects: crossfit RUNS but n_eligible<20 -> size_ok BLOCKS the alert, asserted); documented the (subject,microblock,trial) row-order alignment convention (B9.1 joins on a per-trial id).

net: B9.0 = the contract MACHINERY only (design + dry-run), NO scientific claim. Two red-team rounds hardened the single property that distinguishes B9 from the B8 line -- pre-registration binding -- from DECORATIVE to ENFORCED: the validator now binds the FULL executed tuple (C, Y_design, subject, microblock) to a hash-pinned table AND requires the provenance attestation flags, while remaining Z/T-blind and contract-first. Disclosed honestly: data-level provenance (was the table truly pre-recording, is Y_design truly the pre-assigned cue) is unverifiable from data and must be guaranteed by the B9.1 acquisition protocol; the exact null is collider-free only CONDITIONAL on genuine within-stratum randomization (Z-dependent balance-preserving attrition is out of reach of a Z-blind check). B9.1 (real prospective acquisition OR an existing genuinely-pre-randomized dataset) is a SEPARATE future authorization; Lee2019 is NOT validation.
